title: Annotate feedback anchor object
description: One entry per annotation in a round's feedback array, and the validator for the POST /feedback anchors[] bundle (tech-requirements §5.2, §5.5). type is comment|edit; anchor matches exactly one kind (and within `source` exactly one sub-field); fields are conditionally required on type.

id.description: Stable within the round; assigned by the extension (a1, a2, ...) and persisted verbatim by the server.

type.description: The comment/edit toggle state. comment = intent; edit = literal replacement.

anchor.description: The region the annotation is bound to. Exactly one of three kinds.

original.description: Required when type=edit. The highlighted original span.

replacement.description: Required when type=edit. The literal replacement the agent applies.

elementContext.description: Optional per-element harvest for live pages (outerHTML + computed styles). Omitted when the agent owns the source.

sourceAnchor.description: kind=source: code & Markdown (line), JSON/YAML/TOML (keyPath), CSV/tabular (cell), notebooks (cellIndex, reserved), sub-line (charRange, reserved). Exactly one sub-field present.

lineRange.description: Section / whole-document anchor (v2 #2): [startLine, endLine], inclusive, 1-based. A heading section spans the heading line through the line before the next same-or-higher heading; a whole-document comment is [1, lastLine].

textAnchor.description: kind=text: quote + context, the always-available fallback where positions are lost (PDF, fuzzy docx).

spatialAnchor.description: kind=spatial: images, SVG, video/audio. Normalized 0-1 coordinates. Exactly one of point/box/timestamp (timestamp reserved).
